title: BULGARIA — first skis, snowy slope
prompt: snowy ski slope, pine trees on the sides. @young_Mama center frame on skis, knees BENT, arms OUT for balance, slightly wobbly. @young_Papa next to her on his own skis, left hand HOLDS her right hand to help her stay upright. Both wearing puffy ski jackets, ski pants, helmets, goggles up on forehead, ski poles in hands. Mouth LAUGHS nervously, eyes WIDEN. young_Mama (giggling): "I'm doing it! I'm SKIING!" Mouth GRINS proud from the partner, right hand THUMBS-UP encouragingly. young_Papa (encouraging): "Look at you GO!"
